settings.question: Do I need an account to place an order?
settings.answer: No, you don’t need an account to order from our website. However, setting up an account will allow you to view the status of your orders. Creating an account is easy and can be done either at the checkout or by clicking the profile icon the top right of the website.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: No we only ship to addresses in the United Kingdom.

settings.question: How long will it take to get my order?
settings.answer: Your fitness equipment will be delivered within 7 to 14 days of your order confirmation.
